sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.subtitle: Everything You Need to Know About Our Services

items.question: What services does DOTR offer?
items.answer: DOTR offers end-to-end solutions across 9 pillars: Designing, Development, E-Commerce, Marketing, Content & Creative, AI & Automation, Cloud/DevOps, Security & Maintenance, and Consulting & Support. You can use one or combine several—no vendor juggling.

items.question: Can I use multiple services together?
items.answer: Yes. Our 9 pillars are designed to work together. Many clients use design + development + marketing, or AI & Automation + Consulting. We recommend the right mix via our AI consultant and deliver it as one unified project.

items.question: How fast can you deliver?
items.answer: We deliver in weeks, not months. Most projects see initial results within 2–4 weeks. Full implementation depends on scope but typically 6–12 weeks. Our AI-assisted processes and modern stack (Lovable, Supabase, n8n) keep timelines short.

items.question: Is everything editable from the admin?
items.answer: Yes. Our CMS-driven approach means every piece of content—pages, sections, service descriptions, CTAs, FAQs, SEO meta—is manageable from the admin panel. No coding required.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
items.answer: Yes. Our Consulting & Support pillar includes long-term support, SLAs, maintenance, and digital transformation guidance. We also offer 24/7 AI-powered support and workflow automation.

sections.title: About DOTR
sections.subtitle: AI-First Digital Solutions Company

content.story: DOTR (Dhinoja OmniTech Resolutions) was founded on a simple principle: technology should empower businesses, not complicate them. We're an AI-first company that builds fast, scalable, and future-ready solutions. Every service we offer is designed to be quick, smart, and optimized from the ground up.
content.mission: To deliver innovative AI-powered digital solutions that drive real business results and help our clients achieve their goals faster and more efficiently.
content.vision: To be the leading AI-first partner for businesses seeking to transform their digital presence, automate their operations, and unlock their full potential through intelligent technology.
